summary:
## 92 improvements landed in the last 100 days 🎉

It's been a busy few months for Handy, the free, open-source app that turns your speech into text. **41 people** from around the world pitched in, and the focus was clear: make Handy more reliable, work better on every operating system, and speak more languages. Here's the plain-English rundown.

### ✨ What's new
- **More languages to dictate in.** Added a dedicated Russian speech engine and support for NVIDIA's new high-accuracy model.
- **Smarter cleanup of your text.** You can now connect Handy to more AI services (including Amazon and Cohere) to polish transcripts, and there's a new setting that makes local AI respond faster.
- **Lighter on your computer.** Handy can now free up memory when you're not using it, dropping idle usage from over a gigabyte to a tiny fraction of that.
- **Handier little touches.** Switch transcription models straight from the menu-bar icon, teach Handy your custom words so it spells them right, and turn on a "portable" install on Windows that keeps everything in one folder.

### 🔧 Things we fixed
- **Your recordings are safer.** Audio is now saved before it's transcribed, so a hiccup mid-process no longer loses your words, and you can retry from your history.
- **Fewer crashes and freezes.** Fixed an issue that made the app vanish with no way to bring it back, a crash on older computers, and a bug that cut off longer recordings.
- **Clearer when something's wrong.** Handy now shows a friendly "No microphone found" message instead of failing silently.
- **The pop-up overlay behaves.** It now appears correctly on second monitors and plays nicely with more Linux desktops.
- **A privacy fix.** Your cloud AI keys are no longer written into log files.

### 🌍 More languages
Handy now speaks **Hebrew** (with full right-to-left support), **Bulgarian**, and **Swedish**, and got quality polish for Russian, German, Italian, and Chinese.

### 🛠️ Behind the scenes
Lots of less-visible work to keep Handy healthy: faster automated checks (from ~30 minutes down to about a minute), updated core libraries, and a big effort to make Handy easy to install on NixOS/Linux. In total this period changed about **13,362 lines added and 3,604 removed** across the project.

### 👏 Who built it
Huge thanks to **CJ Pais** (the maintainer, most active by far), **Evgeny Khudoba** (who led the Linux/NixOS packaging push), **Viren Mohindra** (automation and audio), and **Fero** (microphone reliability), along with dozens of other contributors who fixed bugs and added translations.

prs.title: docs: complete Portuguese translation for portable updates
prs.description: Completes the Portuguese (pt) translation by filling in the previously untranslated strings for the portable-update flow.

prs.title: docs: add overlay/pasting issue workaround for Linux to Known Issues
prs.description: Documents a known Linux issue where the recording overlay window intercepts focus and blocks pasting transcribed text, and adds the workaround (set Overlay Position to None, enable audio feedback) to the README's Known Issues section.

prs.title: refactor(nix): drop redundant LD_LIBRARY_PATH wrapper prefix
prs.description: Removes the redundant --prefix LD_LIBRARY_PATH from the Nix wrapper since vulkan-loader and onnxruntime are already on the runtime path.

prs.title: docs(agents): make GitHub workflow rules actionable for AI assistants
prs.description: Rewrites the contributor/agent guidance in a more mandatory, prescriptive style so AI coding assistants reliably follow the project's GitHub workflow rules.

prs.title: refactor(nix): remove phases duplicated from cargo-tauri.hook
prs.description: Drops the custom installPhase and preBuild from the Nix flake because cargo-tauri.hook already provides that build/install behaviour, reducing duplication.

prs.title: fix(nix): Fix for macOS build for nixpkgs
prs.description: Fixes the macOS nixpkgs build where swiftc emitted a duplicate _main symbol into the Apple Intelligence bridge by compiling with -parse-as-library.

prs.title: docs(audio): clarify what the mic-init timing log actually measures
prs.description: Adds a code comment above the 'Microphone stream initialized' log clarifying that the reported elapsed time covers cpal's stream.play() returning; no behaviour change.

prs.title: chore(nix): add bun node_modules normalization scripts
prs.description: Adds scripts to normalize bun's node_modules into a byte-identical, reproducible layout required by the upstream nixpkgs fixed-output derivation.

prs.title: refactor(nix): replace manual bindgen env with rustPlatform.bindgenHook
prs.description: Replaces hand-set LIBCLANG_PATH and BINDGEN_EXTRA_CLANG_ARGS with rustPlatform.bindgenHook in the Nix build, avoiding a class of Vulkan bindgen breakage.

prs.title: fix: improve German translation quality
prs.description: Improves the German (de) translation, filling in untranslated portable-update strings and fixing several wording and quality issues.

prs.title: feat: add AWS Bedrock (Mantle) as post-processing provider
prs.description: Adds AWS Bedrock (Mantle) as a selectable post-processing provider for transcript cleanup.

prs.title: docs: unify CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md
prs.description: Merges CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md into a single source of truth (AGENTS.md) to eliminate duplication and inconsistency in the AI-agent instructions.

prs.title: fix(overlay): parse HANDY_NO_GTK_LAYER_SHELL as boolean
prs.description: Parses the HANDY_NO_GTK_LAYER_SHELL env var as a proper boolean so values like 0/false/no no longer accidentally disable the GTK layer shell. Follow-up to #1121.

prs.title: query gpu async
prs.description: Makes the whisper.cpp GPU query asynchronous instead of running it synchronously so it no longer blocks. Relates to #1207.

prs.title: docs(readme): add Linux startup troubleshooting section
prs.description: Adds a Linux startup troubleshooting section to the README documenting the HANDY_NO_GTK_LAYER_SHELL env var. Follow-up to #1121.

prs.title: Fix (linux) overlay problem in kde
prs.description: Fixes the recording overlay on Linux/KDE, adding a HANDY_NO_GTK_LAYER_SHELL escape hatch for compositors where the GTK layer shell misbehaves.

prs.title: perf: add reasoning_effort passthrough to avoid thinking-mode latency in local models
prs.description: Adds a reasoning_effort passthrough so local post-processing models (e.g. Gemma/Qwen via Ollama) can skip thinking mode, cutting latency for simple transcript cleanup.

prs.title: nix: set ALSA_PLUGIN_DIR via symlinkJoin
prs.description: Uses a symlinkJoin to expose a single ALSA_PLUGIN_DIR directory, fixing zero-audio failures on non-NixOS home-manager setups where a colon-separated plugin list broke ALSA.

prs.title: fix crash on old cpus
prs.description: Fixes a crash on older CPUs, likely from missing instruction-set support.

prs.title: Update Italian translation
prs.description: Updates the Italian (it) translation.

prs.title: add cohere
prs.description: Adds Cohere as a post-processing provider option.

prs.title: fix(nix): remove onnxruntime overlay, use nixpkgs native package
prs.description: Removes the custom onnxruntime Nix overlay now that nixpkgs ships onnxruntime 1.24.4, which satisfies ort-sys 2.0.0-rc.12.

prs.title: Preserve legacy portable installs during updates
prs.description: Preserves portable mode during updater-driven installs when the target still uses Handy's legacy empty 'portable' marker, scoped to /UPDATE runs.

prs.title: upgrade transcribe rs to 0.3.5
prs.description: Upgrades transcribe-rs to 0.3.5, adding 250ms of start padding for Parakeet that improves int8-quantized transcription accuracy. Helps #1165.

prs.title: Load the VAD in parallel to ASR model
prs.description: Loads the voice-activity-detection (VAD) model in parallel with the ASR model to speed up startup.

prs.title: fix(tray): set tray tooltip text on Windows
prs.description: Sets the tray icon tooltip on Windows (using the version label) so hovering no longer shows an empty bubble. Fixes #1184.

prs.title: docs: add manual release signature verification steps
prs.description: Adds README steps for manually verifying release signatures with minisign, including decoding Handy's base64-encoded public key and .sig files. Addresses #407.

prs.title: fix: don't log cloud provider keys
prs.description: Stops logging the full AppSettings struct so cloud provider API keys are no longer written to the logs.

prs.title: docs: add feature freeze notice to CONTRIBUTING.md and fix typo
prs.description: Adds a feature-freeze notice to CONTRIBUTING.md and fixes a typo.

prs.title: Use a more conservative OpenCC conversion for zh-Hant transcription
prs.description: Switches to a more conservative OpenCC conversion for Traditional Chinese (zh-Hant) transcription output to avoid over-converting characters.

prs.title: Add Hebrew language support
prs.description: Adds full Hebrew localization, including the locale, app-language entry, and right-to-left (RTL) support.

prs.title: rearrange some ui
prs.description: Rearranges settings UI: moves History above Post Processing and moves the cancel shortcut to General when push-to-talk is disabled.

prs.title: enumerate and list gpus in the whisper dropdown, improve auto gpu
prs.description: Enumerates available GPUs and lists them in the Whisper dropdown, and improves automatic GPU selection.

prs.title: fix: require magic string in portable marker to prevent false portable mode on scoop installs
prs.description: Requires a magic string inside the 'portable' marker file so Scoop installs (which leave an empty 'portable' file) no longer falsely trigger portable mode and lose data on update. Fixes #1124.

prs.title: Add Bulgarian language
prs.description: Adds Bulgarian language support.

prs.title: [BUGFIX] Fix model speed/accuracy indicator alignment
prs.description: Fixes the alignment of the model speed/accuracy indicator in the UI.

prs.title: fix: show friendly error when no audio input device is available
prs.description: Adds a pre-flight check and a friendly 'No Microphone Found' toast (in all 17 locales) when no audio input device is available. Fixes #1114.

prs.title: Adding Swedish language translation
prs.description: Adds Swedish language translation.

prs.title: Save recordings before transcription
prs.description: Persists the WAV immediately after recording and tracks pending/completed/failed history states so recordings aren't lost when transcription fails, with retry from History.

prs.title: Remove outdated CHANGELOG.md
prs.description: Removes the outdated CHANGELOG.md (last updated at v0.3.0) since GitHub Releases are now the source of truth. Closes #1108.

prs.title: fix: sha256 verification to prevent corrupt partial download loop
prs.description: Adds SHA-256 verification of downloads and properly cancels in-flight requests so corrupt .partial files no longer trap users in an infinite re-download loop. Fixes #858.

prs.title: improve history performance
prs.description: Improves History view performance, mainly by paginating the scroll.

prs.title: Update Raycast integration description
prs.description: Updates the README's Raycast integration description to mention the new language-switch feature in extension v1.1.0.

prs.title: docs: add Raycast extension to Integrations section
prs.description: Adds a new Integrations section to the README mentioning the Raycast extension for Handy.

prs.title: fix(ci): use sign-binaries: true in main-build.yml
prs.description: Sets sign-binaries: true in main-build.yml so Tauri no longer fails on set-but-empty signing env vars, which had broken all 7 platform builds.

prs.title: whisper-rs 0.16.0 and ort.rc12
prs.description: Upgrades whisper-rs to 0.16.0 and the ort runtime to rc.12.

prs.title: fix(ci): grant contents: write in main-build.yml
prs.description: Grants contents: write in main-build.yml to match the reusable build.yml's required permissions, fixing a workflow startup failure. Follow-up to #1091.

prs.title: ci: run full build and quality checks on push to main
prs.description: Adds a workflow that runs full builds and quality checks on every push to main (not just on PRs) so main's buildability is verified automatically.

prs.title: feat(audio): lazy stream close for bluetooth mic latency
prs.description: Adds an opt-in experimental 'lazy_stream_close' setting that keeps the mic stream open for 30s after recording, reducing latency for back-to-back transcriptions on Bluetooth mics.

prs.title: fix: prevent idle watcher from unloading model during recording
prs.description: Prevents the idle watcher from unloading the model mid-recording when model_unload_timeout is set to Immediately, which had been killing transcription of clips longer than ~10s.

prs.title: feat(audio): use device default sample rate and always downsample
prs.description: Opens the mic at the device's native sample rate and always downsamples, improving audio quality on devices (e.g. Bluetooth) where 16kHz is supported but not native.

prs.title: upgrade path from old giga-am to new
prs.description: Adds an upgrade path that migrates users from the old GigaAM model to the new one.

prs.title: add extra recording buffer
prs.description: Adds an extra recording buffer to avoid clipping audio at the edges of a recording.

prs.title: Update Italian translation
prs.description: Updates the Italian translation, renaming 'unload' to 'release' to avoid clashing with the word for 'download'.

prs.title: ci: reduce PR check time from ~30 min to ~1 min
prs.description: Adds concurrency groups, path filters, and Nix caching so PR checks drop from ~30 minutes to ~1 minute and duplicate runs no longer pile up.

prs.title: fix: auto-unload model after idle timeout to reduce memory
prs.description: Adds configurable automatic model unloading after an idle timeout, cutting idle memory use from ~1.1GB to ~80MB.

prs.title: feat(nix): NixOS integration — ALSA_PLUGIN_DIR + nixosModule
prs.description: Adds NixOS out-of-the-box support: sets ALSA_PLUGIN_DIR in the package wrapper (fixing zero-sample audio under PipeWire) and adds a nixosModule for system-level config.

prs.title: experimental: pick between cpu/gpu acceleration + enable directml on windows
prs.description: Adds an experimental option to choose between CPU and GPU acceleration and enables DirectML on Windows.

prs.title: Migrate to transcribe-rs-0.3.1 and add Canary support
prs.description: Migrates to the transcribe-rs 0.3.x API and adds support for the NVIDIA Canary 1B v2 model. Closes #1022.

prs.title: ensure samples don't get dropped
prs.description: Ensures audio samples aren't dropped during recording. Relates to #963.

prs.title: fix: keep Windows microphone guidance Windows-only
prs.description: Restricts the Windows microphone-permission guidance so it only appears on Windows.

prs.title: Add Windows installation with winget to README
prs.description: Adds winget installation instructions for Windows to the README.

prs.title: Reduce `VolumeSlider` step size from 10% to 1%
prs.description: Reduces the VolumeSlider step size from 10% to 1% for finer control.

prs.title: upgrade to handy-keys 0.2.3
prs.description: Upgrades the handy-keys dependency to 0.2.3.

prs.title: be able to change models from the tray
prs.description: Adds the ability to switch transcription models directly from the tray menu.

prs.title: attempt to clean up warnings on build
prs.description: Cleans up compiler warnings emitted during the build.

prs.title: Using the whisper `initial_prompt` field for custom words
prs.description: Passes the user's custom words as Whisper's initial_prompt to bias the model's vocabulary during decoding; non-Whisper engines keep the existing post-correction.

prs.title: Add Windows microphone permission onboarding
prs.description: Adds a Windows microphone-permission onboarding flow that detects blocked access, routes users to the permissions screen, and opens Windows privacy settings.

prs.title: unwind instead of crash
prs.description: Unwinds on panic instead of aborting, so the app degrades gracefully rather than crashing.

prs.title: default to handy keys on windows
prs.description: Makes the handy-keys keyboard backend the default on Windows.

prs.title: fix(nix): replace manual hash management with bun2nix
prs.description: Replaces manual Nix dependency-hash management with bun2nix.

prs.title: docs: add note in readme about homebrew install
prs.description: Adds a README note about Homebrew cask maintenance and updates the install steps.

prs.title: fix(nix): Fixed nix hash for dependencies, added CI job and script for updating dependencies versions
prs.description: Fixes the Nix dependency hash and adds a CI job and script to keep dependency versions updated. Fixes #934.

prs.title: fix: overlay not showing on non-primary monitors
prs.description: Fixes the recording overlay not appearing on non-primary monitors by using monitor.position()/size() instead of work_area() when computing overlay position.

prs.title: Add model loading failure notifications with i18n support
prs.description: Adds localized user notifications when a model fails to load, listening for the loading_failed model-state event. Fixes #713.

prs.title: ui: improve scrollbar UI with custom colors and rounded thumb
prs.description: Improves the scrollbar styling with custom colors and a rounded thumb.

prs.title: Improve Russian translation
prs.description: Reviews and improves the Russian translation across the UI.

prs.title: Handle microphone init failure without aborting
prs.description: Replaces panic paths in AudioRecorder::open with proper error propagation via a startup handshake channel, so a microphone-init failure no longer hard-crashes the app.

prs.title: fix(ci): simplify Bun setup for Windows ARM64
prs.description: Simplifies the Bun setup in CI for Windows ARM64.

prs.title: feat: language-aware filler word removal
prs.description: Makes filler-word removal language-aware so words like 'um'/'ha' are only stripped where they're truly fillers, and adds a custom_filler_words override. Addresses #943.

prs.title: Fix Italian translation
prs.description: Fixes the Italian translation of the recordingRetention settings to reflect auto-deletion of old recordings, plus minor style and consistency fixes.

prs.title: feat: add portable mode to NSIS installer
prs.description: Adds a portable-mode option to the Windows NSIS installer.

prs.title: Update translation.json
prs.description: Updates translation.json with translation string changes.

prs.title: docs: add Linux install steps and AppImage troubleshooting
prs.description: Adds Linux from-source install steps (deb extraction) and AppImage build troubleshooting for rolling-release distros to BUILD.md. Closes #946.

prs.title: upgrade to handy keys 0.2.2
prs.description: Upgrades handy-keys to 0.2.2. Aims to help #305 and #912.

prs.title: feat: add GigaAM v3 for Russian speech recognition
prs.description: Adds the GigaAM v3 e2e_ctc engine for Russian speech recognition with punctuation, Latin characters and digits, using an int8-quantized ONNX model.

prs.title: fix: upgrade tauri-plugin-updater to v2.10.0 to fix duplicate registry entries (#873)
prs.description: Upgrades tauri-plugin-updater to v2.10.0 to fix duplicate Windows registry entries created by OTA updates. Fixes #873.

prs.title: fix(i18n): tray menu shows Simplified Chinese when Traditional Chinese is selected
prs.description: Fixes locale truncation in the Rust tray menu so the tray shows Traditional Chinese (zh-TW) instead of Simplified Chinese when selected. Follow-up to #796.

prs.title: Translated section "keyboardImplementation" translations for the languages i know and could help with (FR, PT, ES, TR)
prs.description: Adds keyboardImplementation section translations for French, Portuguese, Spanish and Turkish.

prs.title: [macOS] Fix tray icon disabled + start hidden causing app to become permanently invisible
prs.description: Fixes a macOS state where disabling the tray icon plus 'Start Hidden' made the app permanently unreachable (no window, tray, or dock icon).

prs.title: fix: auto-refresh model list when switching post-processing providers
prs.description: Auto-fetches the valid model list when switching post-processing providers and clears stale cached/stored models, preventing failed requests from an invalid model selection.

prs.title: use blocking for handy keys
prs.description: Switches handy-keys to blocking mode. Fixes #875.
